templates.name: 11th Workshop Space Engineering Technology
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for the 11th Workshop on Space Engineering and Technology (WETE). Designed for academic conference papers with support for abstracts, figures, tables, references, and IEEE-style formatting.

author.name: Italo Pinto Rodrigues, Aline Castilho Rodrigues-Siqueli, Yuri Matheus Dias Pereira

templates.name: 12th Iccp Proceedings Template
templates.shortDescription: Official proceedings template for the 12th International Congress on Cementitious Composites and Sustainable Construction Materials (ICCP). Designed for two-column academic conference papers with support for abstracts, figures, tables, equations, citations, and acknowledgements.

templates.name: 2024 Jadicc Template
templates.shortDescription: Official article template for JADICC 2024. Designed for Spanish-language academic papers with support for abstracts, keywords, figures, tables, citations, and bibliography in a single-column layout.

templates.name: 24th Central European Conference On Cryptology Submission Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for submitting extended abstracts to the 24th Central European Conference on Cryptology (CECC 24), featuring author affiliations, ORCID support, configurable headers, keyword metadata, and BibTeX bibliography.
templates.license: MIT, LPPL, proprietary with redistribution permission, etc.

author.name: Piotr Jankowski, Maciej Wieszczyński, Jan Kowalski, Andrzej Jaworski

templates.name: Abstract Template Oecs19
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 19th International Conference on Optics of Excitons in Confined Systems (OECS 19), Warsaw, Poland. Supports multiple author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Abstract Template Smcbs2025
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 12th International Workshop on Surface Modification for Chemical and Biochemical Sensing (SMCBS'2025). Supports multiple author affiliations, presenting author underline, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Abstract Template Sst2022
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for SST 2022 (Australasian International Conference on Speech Science and Technology), Canberra, ACT, Australia. Supports single and multiple authors, tables, figures, equations, and IEEE-style bibliography with anonymous review compliance.

templates.name: Abstract Template Ucm2025
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the Workshop on Ultracold Molecules 2025, Warsaw, Poland (June 24–27, 2025). Supports multiple author affiliations, presenting author underline, corresponding author email, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Acm Mile High Video Conference 2023 Abstract
templates.shortDescription: ACM acmart-based short paper and abstract template for the Mile-High Video Conference 2023, including MHV 2023 metadata, CCS concepts, keywords, acknowledgments, and ACM reference formatting.

templates.name: Ai4treat 2023 Abstract
templates.shortDescription: Compact academic abstract template for AI4Treat 2023 with title, author affiliation, section headings, figure support, footer label, and bibliography.

templates.name: Annsim 2026 Conference Paper
templates.shortDescription: Official ANNSIM 2026 conference proceedings LaTeX template featuring the SCS conference class, bibliography style, sample assets, and paper formatting guidelines.
templates.license: Proprietary (Original SCS ANNSIM 2026 Author Kit; redistributed with the original conference template for authoring purposes.)

author.name: The Society for Modeling & Simulation International (SCS)

templates.name: Bdletter
templates.shortDescription: A LaTeX class for writing authentic Bangladeshi official letters. Supports government offices, schools, colleges, banks, NGOs, and general public use. Follows the standard Bangladeshi formal letter structure with বরাবর, বিষয়, and বিনীত নিবেদক blocks. Noto Serif Bengali font is bundled — no installation required.

templates.name: Ffk2025 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 10th International Conference on Precision Physics and Fundamental Physical Constants (FFK 2025). Designed for conference abstract submissions with support for author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and references.

templates.name: Icsm5 Submission Template
templates.shortDescription: ICSM-5 conference submission template adapted from Elsevier's elsarticle numbered-style bundle (3p, 11pt, final). Provides title/author/address blocks with corresponding-author and email handling, structured abstract and keywords, numbered theorem/lemma/definition/remark environments, example figures, tables, equations, and a numbered bibliography via elsarticle-num-names.

templates.name: Ieee Computational Intelligence Letters
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE LaTeX template bundle for IEEE Computational Intelligence Letters submissions. Includes the standard IEEEtran.cls class file, sample article structure, and comprehensive formatting guidelines.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE conference paper template (conference_101719.tex) using IEEEtran.cls. Standard two-column conference layout with abstract, IEEEkeywords, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgment, and numbered bibliography. Includes detailed in-source authoring guidance and common formatting pitfalls.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template Ancs 2019
templates.shortDescription: Official conference paper template for ANCS 2019 (ACM/IEEE Symposium on Architectures for Networking and Communications Systems), built on IEEEtran.cls. Adds fancyhdr-based running header with conference name and configurable copyright/footer notice. Includes abstract, IEEEkeywords, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgment, and numbered bibliography.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template Reykjavik University
templates.shortDescription: IEEE conference-style lab/project report template customized for Reykjavík University's course use, based on IEEEtran.cls. Offers two interchangeable report structures (IMRAD and Design Paper) with extensive instructional scaffolding, Icelandic-character (T1/UTF-8) support, Axiomatic Design guidance, SI units, subfigures, and an instructional appendix.

templates.name: Ieee Data Compression Conference Template
templates.shortDescription: Official manuscript template for the Data Compression Conference (DCC), using the custom dccpaper.cls document class. Single-column, 12pt format with title/author block, abstract, sections/subsections, figures, tables, and IEEE-style bibliography via IEEEbib.bst.

templates.name: Ieee Data Descriptions
templates.shortDescription: TODO: verify official Aims & Scope for IEEE Data Descriptions on IEEE Xplore and replace this placeholder.

templates.name: Ieee Demo Template Compsoc Conferences
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEEtran.cls demo template for IEEE Computer Society conferences. Demonstrates two-column compsoc format with multiple author affiliations, abstract, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Ieee Electron Device Letters
templates.shortDescription: TODO: verify official Aims & Scope for IEEE Electron Device Letters on IEEE Xplore and replace this placeholder.

templates.name: Ieee Isec 2022 Posters
templates.shortDescription: Poster abstract template for IEEE ISEC 2022 (Integrated STEM Education Conference). Single-column one-page layout using IEEEtran.cls in journal mode. Supports up to three authors with institutional affiliations and a structured abstract.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions Latex2e Templates
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE Transactions LaTeX2e template bundle by Michael Shell. Includes 7 skeleton templates covering journal, conference, Computer Society, ComSoc, and Transactions on Magnetics formats, with full IEEEtran.cls, BibTeX style files, and detailed formatting instructions.

templates.name: Ieee Vis 2026 Workshop Proposal
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE VIS 2026 Workshop Proposal template for preparing workshop submissions following the IEEE VGTC formatting guidelines.

author.name: IEEE Visualization and Graphics Technical Community (VGTC)

templates.name: Ieeeintelec2024 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE INTELEC 2024 (International Telecommunications Energy Conference). Supports double-blind digest and final paper modes, two-column IEEE layout, abstract, keywords, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgments, and numbered bibliography.

templates.name: Iepc 2022 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEPC 2022 (37th International Electric Propulsion Conference), adapted from AIAA conference paper guidelines. Supports multiple authors with affiliations, nomenclature, figures, tables, equations with SI units, chemical formulas, appendix, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Imampc2024 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 13th International Meeting on Atomic and Molecular Physics and Chemistry (IMAMPC 2024). Designed for conference abstract submissions with support for author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and references.

templates.name: Mom 2026 Challenge Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for preparing solution papers for the 2026 Model Management (MoM) Challenge using the ACM SIGCONF format.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official abstract submission template for the 2025 Planetary Defense Conference (PDC), featuring the Elsevier elsarticle class, structured front matter, bibliography management, and support for figures and keywords.
templates.license: CMIT, LPPL, proprietary with redistribution permission, etc.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Extended Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official extended abstract template for the 9th IAA Planetary Defense Conference (PDC 2025), featuring modular document sections, custom conference styling, bibliography support, and figure management.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Paper Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for the 9th IAA Planetary Defense Conference (PDC 2025), featuring the Elsevier elsarticle class, modular document organization, bibliography management, and support for abstracts, acknowledgements, keywords, and figures.
